entry.title: New: CC 25-21 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCIL CHAIR LEE, transmitting a proposed amendment to Bill 129 (2025), entitled "A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE ESTABLISHING THAT THE BOARD OF ETHICS' POSITIONS FOR INVESTIGATOR AND ADMINISTRATIVE ASSISTANT MAY BE FILLED ON A PART-TIME BASIS AND PAID ON A PRO-RATA BASIS".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
